description: An international shipping consortium needs to assess the feasibility of routing cargo through the Northwest Passage during the summer melt window. Your analysis request is located at ~/Desktop/arctic_routing_request.txt. Using NASA Panoply and the NCEP surface air temperature climatology dataset (~/PanoplyData/air.mon.ltm.nc), generate two polar-projected temperature maps for July and August with values in Celsius for the final assessment report. Save all outputs to ~/Documents/ArcticRouting/.
